response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial initiative, his profile aligns more closely with a hands-on Staff or Senior Full-Stack Engineer rather than a Director-level AI Strategist. His exposure to artificial intelligence appears limited to his most recent role, which falls short of the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic customer-advisory experience required for this specialized Principal-level position.
strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains.
Demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and community leadership through open-source projects, talks, and workshops.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK) at top-tier companies.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and enterprise customer-advisory experience expected for this role.
AI expertise is relatively recent and does not reflect the 'recognized industry expert' status preferred for the position.
Does not hold an advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
